core_change: Coverage is not considered complete at family level only. L1 and S1 must both enumerate at least down to subtype groups.

coverage_unit.variant_policy: Variants are auxiliary refinements below subtype and do not define first-pass completeness by themselves.

layer_roles.L1: Theory-facing semantic enumeration of geometry families and subtype groups.
layer_roles.S1: Machine-readable geometry-first source layer that must preserve the same family/subtype coverage structure for future P-layer compilation.

tier_policy.tier_1: minimum stable core needed to avoid early theoretical breakage across relativity / quantum / gauge / unification discussions
